title: Common Pitfalls and Rules of useEffect
description: Avoid infinite loops and stale closures.

slides.title: Infinite Loops and Stale Closures 🔁
Stale Closure Example
slides.content: Missing dependency leads to stale value:

quizData.question: What happens if you update state inside useEffect and include that state in the dependency array?
quizData.explanation: The effect updates state, which triggers a re-render, then the effect runs again because the dependency changed, leading to an infinite loop.
